items.title: ulian Champagnie's improbable journey from being cut by Philly on Valentine's Day 2023 to reaching the NBA Finals came to mind as he held onto the ball at the end of Game 7.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
ulian Champagnie's improbable journey from being cut by Philly on Valentine's Day 2023 to reaching the NBA Finals came to mind as he held onto the ball at the end of Game 7.

"I thought it was over," he said of getting let go by the Sixers.

items.title: De’Aaron Fox called it “probably one of the bigger plays we've had this season."
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
De’Aaron Fox called it “probably one of the bigger plays we've had this season."

Victor Wembanyama called it “the definition of a winning play.”

“It” was Luke Kornet’s dramatic chase-down block of Isaiah Hartenstein’s dunk attempt.

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: How Luke Kornet's teammates reacted to his block, 'the biggest play' of Game 7
media.description: The big man's chase-down block of Isaiah Hartenstein's dunk shifted the momentum back to the Spurs at a crucial juncture in the fourth quarter.

items.title: That was fun.
items.author: J.E. Skeets
items.body_excerpt: That was fun.

items.title: May 31, 1984: CBS Sports' intro for Game 2 of the NBA Finals between the Boston Celtics and the Los Angeles Lakers.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
May 31, 1984: CBS Sports' intro for Game 2 of the NBA Finals between the Boston Celtics and the Los Angeles Lakers.

The Celtics defeated the Lakers, 124-121, in overtime. Larry Bird had 27 PTS/13 REB/2 BLK for Boston. James Worthy scored 29 PTS (11-12 FG) to lead Los Angeles.

items.title: I had forgotten how well Tyler Kolek played in that Cup Final... and all 3 NY's Vegas games:
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
I had forgotten how well Tyler Kolek played in that Cup Final... and all 3 NY's Vegas games:

🏀 Highest Plus/Minus on the Knicks over their three wins in Vegas:
​Tyler Kolek: +45

New York outscored their opponents by 45 points in the 44 minutes Kolek was on the court.

items.title: Chet Holmgren shot 27.8% this season in 11 games against Victor Wembanyama.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Chet Holmgren shot 27.8% this season in 11 games against Victor Wembanyama.

Wembanyama converted 51.2% of his shots on Holmgren as the primary defender.

All season long, Wembanyama destroyed Holmgren on both ends of the court.

(via Evan Sidery)
#NBA

items.title: In the Knicks' victory over the Spurs in the NBA Cup Final, Mitchell Robinson ripped down 15 rebounds (including 10 on the offensive glass) in just 18 minutes.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
In the Knicks' victory over the Spurs in the NBA Cup Final, Mitchell Robinson ripped down 15 rebounds (including 10 on the offensive glass) in just 18 minutes.

New York's 32 second-chance points in that contest were the most by a Knicks team in a single game this decade.

items.title: Of all rookies and sophomores in NBA history, only three have 9+ games with at least 15+ points, 5+ rebounds and 5+ assists in a single postseason:
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Of all rookies and sophomores in NBA history, only three have 9+ games with at least 15+ points, 5+ rebounds and 5+ assists in a single postseason:

Larry Bird,
Magic Johnson 
and
Stephon Castle

items.title: Knicks have been to NBA Finals 9 times.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Knicks have been to NBA Finals 9 times.

Here are the big men they faced:
2026 Victor Wembanyama
1999 David Robinson/Tim Duncan
1994 Hakeem
1973 Wilt
1972 Wilt
1970 Wilt
1953 George Mikan
1952 Mikan
1951 Arnie Risen

All are in the Hall of Fame, except for 22-year old Wemby.

(via Josh Dubow)
#NBA

items.title: How important/impressive has Stephon Castle been defensively this postseason?
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
How important/impressive has Stephon Castle been defensively this postseason? 

Consider this:
According to NBA tracking data, the four players Castle has spent the most time defending in these playoffs are:
Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, 
Julius Randle, 
Deni Avdija,
Anthony Edwards

Crucial that Hart knocks down open 3PTs to force San Antonio to adjust thier approach (as he did in Game 2 vs. Cleveland).

- 46 points in paint
- 54 fast break points
- 82 points on restricted area FGs

items.title: In the past six years, home teams have gone 9-12 in Game 7s:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
In the past six years, home teams have gone 9-12 in Game 7s:
That’s a 42.8% win rate.

Prior to 2020, home teams were 106-29 in Game 7s:
That’s a 78.5% win rate.

(via @timbontemps.bsky.social)
#NBA
